'''âf-w-dh''' ('''kafawadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:code|code]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:code|code]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-w-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafawadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifawadh|thifawadh]] || [[word:jifawadh|jifawadh]] || [[word:shifawadh|shifawadh]] || [[word:kifawadh|kifawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufawadh|thuthufawadh]] || [[word:jujufawadh|jujufawadh]] || [[word:shushufawadh|shushufawadh]] || [[word:kukufawadh|kukufawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufawadh|thufawadh]] || [[word:jufawadh|jufawadh]] || [[word:shufawadh|shufawadh]] || [[word:kufawadh|kufawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufawadh|thufawadh]] || [[word:jufawadh|jufawadh]] || [[word:shufawadh|shufawadh]] || [[word:kufawadh|kufawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefawadh|thefawadh]] || [[word:jefawadh|jefawadh]] || [[word:shefawadh|shefawadh]] || [[word:kefawadh|kefawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofawadh|thothofawadh]] || [[word:jojofawadh|jojofawadh]] || [[word:shoshofawadh|shoshofawadh]] || [[word:kokofawadh|kokofawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofawadh|thofawadh]] || [[word:jofawadh|jofawadh]] || [[word:shofawadh|shofawadh]] || [[word:kofawadh|kofawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofawadh|thofawadh]] || [[word:jofawadh|jofawadh]] || [[word:shofawadh|shofawadh]] || [[word:kofawadh|kofawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfawadh|thĂŠfawadh]] || [[word:jĂŠfawadh|jĂŠfawadh]] || [[word:shĂŠfawadh|shĂŠfawadh]] || [[word:kĂŠfawadh|kĂŠfawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafawadh|thathafawadh]] || [[word:jajafawadh|jajafawadh]] || [[word:shashafawadh|shashafawadh]] || [[word:kakafawadh|kakafawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafawadh|thafawadh]] || [[word:jafawadh|jafawadh]] || [[word:shafawadh|shafawadh]] || [[word:kafawadh|kafawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafawadh|thafawadh]] || [[word:jafawadh|jafawadh]] || [[word:shafawadh|shafawadh]] || [[word:kafawadh|kafawadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafawadh|shafawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafawadh|goshafawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafawadh|gokishafawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafawadhnĂŒ|shafawadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafawadhnknĂŒ|goshafawadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafawadhnĂŒ|gokishafawadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafawadhshĂ«|shafawadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkshĂ«|goshafawadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafawadhshĂ«|gokishafawadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafawadhro|shafawadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkro|goshafawadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafawadhro|gokishafawadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafawadhmu|shafawadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkmu|goshafawadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafawadhmu|gokishafawadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafawadhsher|shafawadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafawadhnksher|goshafawadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafawadhsher|gokishafawadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafawadhng|shafawadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkng|goshafawadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafawadhng|gokishafawadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafawadhya|shafawadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkya|goshafawadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafawadhya|gokishafawadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafawadhyam|shafawadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkyam|goshafawadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafawadhyam|gokishafawadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafawadhnĂŒshĂ«|shafawadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafawadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafawadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafawadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafawadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafawadhnĂŒro|shafawadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafawadhnknĂŒro|goshafawadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafawadhnĂŒro|gokishafawadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafawadhnĂŒmu|shafawadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafawadhnknĂŒmu|goshafawadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafawadhnĂŒmu|gokishafawadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafawadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shafawadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafawadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafawadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafawadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafawadhshĂ«ro|shafawadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkshĂ«ro|goshafawadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafawadhshĂ«ro|gokishafawadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafawadhshĂ«mu|shafawadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkshĂ«mu|goshafawadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafawadhshĂ«mu|gokishafawadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafawadhronĂŒ|shafawadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkronĂŒ|goshafawadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafawadhronĂŒ|gokishafawadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafawadhroshĂ«|shafawadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkroshĂ«|goshafawadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafawadhroshĂ«|gokishafawadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafawadhromu|shafawadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkromu|goshafawadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafawadhromu|gokishafawadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafawadhmunĂŒ|shafawadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkmunĂŒ|goshafawadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafawadhmunĂŒ|gokishafawadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafawadhmushĂ«|shafawadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkmushĂ«|goshafawadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafawadhmushĂ«|gokishafawadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafawadhmuro|shafawadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafawadhnkmuro|goshafawadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafawadhmuro|gokishafawadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
